factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The product is isolated with no useful context or only a generic marketplace presentation.
The image does not make a benefit legible.
The eye path is obvious, text is readable if present, and supporting elements do not distract.
Texture, finish, edges, and construction details are clearly visible.
Brand and product details provide a credible trust signal.
Strong contrast and sharp subject boundaries make the image readable.
The image has campaign intent with a branded scene and clear presentation.
